g.text: identity(1,1); Primary key for Product records.
0 = Product is purchased, 1 = Product is manufactured in-house.
0 = Product is not a salable item. 1 = Product is salable.
Inventory level that triggers a purchase order or work order.
nullable; Unit of measure for Size column.
nullable; Unit of measure for Weight column.
Number of days required to manufacture the product.
nullable; R = Road, M = Mountain, T = Touring, S = Standard
nullable; H = High, M = Medium, L = Low
nullable; W = Womens, M = Mens, U = Universal
nullable; Product is a member of this product subcategory. Foreign key to ProductSubCategory.ProductSubCategoryID.
nullable; Product is a member of this product model. Foreign key to ProductModel.ProductModelID.
Date the product was available for sale.
nullable; Date the product was no longer available for sale.
nullable; Date the product was discontinued.
ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.
